history.en: Orientals are passionate about the people in their lives. They become extremely attached to their humans, so be prepared for a lifetime commitment. When you are not available to entertain her, an Oriental will divert herself by jumping on top of the refrigerator, opening drawers, seeking out new hideaways.
history.zh: 东方猫对生活中的人充满热情。它们对人类极其依恋，所以要做好终身承诺的准备。当你无法陪伴它时，东方猫会通过跳上冰箱顶部、打开抽屉、寻找新的藏身之处来转移注意力。

overview.en: The Oriental cat is a sleek, elegant breed known for its striking appearance and vibrant personality. Originating from the United States, these cats are extremely energetic, affectionate, and intelligent. They form deep bonds with their owners and thrive on constant interaction. Orientals are social butterflies, often following their humans around the house and engaging in playful antics. Their curiosity knows no bounds, leading them to explore high places like refrigerators or open drawers. With a short, fine coat and large ears, they come in a wide variety of colors and patterns. Despite their active nature, they are also loving lap cats when they choose to settle down. This breed demands attention and can become lonely or destructive if left alone for long periods. Ideal for families or individuals who can dedicate time and affection, an Oriental brings endless entertainment and companionship.
overview.zh: 东方猫是一种体型修长、优雅的品种，以其引人注目的外表和充满活力的个性而闻名。原产于美国，这些猫非常精力充沛、深情且聪明。它们与主人建立深厚的感情，并渴望持续的互动。东方猫是社交达人，经常跟着主人满屋跑，并参与顽皮的把戏。它们的好奇心无止境，导致它们探索高处如冰箱顶部或打开抽屉。拥有短而细腻的毛发和大耳朵，它们有各种颜色和图案。尽管天性活跃，它们也是可爱的膝上猫，当它们选择安静时。这个品种需要关注，如果长时间独处会感到孤独或产生破坏行为。适合能投入时间和感情的家庭或个人，东方猫带来无尽的娱乐和陪伴。

care.en: Daily care for an Oriental cat is relatively low-maintenance due to its short coat. A weekly brushing with a soft bristle brush or grooming mitt helps remove loose hair and keeps the coat glossy. These cats are active and require daily interactive play sessions to burn off energy—aim for at least 20-30 minutes of play with toys like wand toys, laser pointers, or puzzle feeders. They also enjoy climbing, so provide cat trees or shelves. Regular vet check-ups (at least annually) are essential to monitor for common health issues like dental problems or respiratory conditions. Keep their ears clean by checking weekly and gently wiping with a damp cloth. Trim nails every 2-3 weeks and brush teeth regularly to prevent dental disease. Orientals are indoor-only cats to protect them from traffic, predators, and diseases. Provide a stimulating environment with plenty of toys and perches.
care.zh: 东方猫的日常护理相对简单，因为它们的被毛短。每周用软毛刷或美容手套梳理一次，可以去除死毛并保持毛发有光泽。这些猫很活跃，需要每天互动玩耍以消耗精力——每天至少20-30分钟的玩耍时间，使用逗猫棒、激光笔或益智喂食器等玩具。它们也喜欢攀爬，所以提供猫爬架或架子。定期兽医检查（至少每年一次）对于监测常见健康问题如牙齿问题或呼吸系统疾病至关重要。每周检查耳朵，用湿布轻轻擦拭保持清洁。每2-3周修剪指甲，并定期刷牙以预防牙病。东方猫应仅限室内饲养，以保护它们免受交通、捕食者和疾病的伤害。提供刺激的环境，配备大量玩具和栖架。

training.en: Orientals are highly intelligent and trainable, often eager to learn tricks and commands. Use positive reinforcement techniques like treats, praise, and clicker training. Start with basic commands such as 'sit', 'stay', or 'come'. They can also be taught to fetch, walk on a leash, or perform agility tasks. Keep sessions short (5-10 minutes) and fun to maintain their interest. Because they are social, training can be a bonding activity. Consistency is key, and avoid punishment as it can damage trust. Orientals respond well to puzzle toys that challenge their minds. They can also be trained to use a scratching post instead of furniture. For litter box training, provide a clean box and place it in a quiet area. These cats are quick learners, but their stubborn streak may require patience. Reward desired behaviors immediately to reinforce learning.
training.zh: 东方猫非常聪明且可训练，通常渴望学习技巧和命令。使用正面强化技术，如零食、表扬和响片训练。从基本命令如“坐下”、“等待”或“过来”开始。它们也可以学会捡球、牵绳散步或完成敏捷任务。保持训练时间短（5-10分钟）且有趣，以维持它们的兴趣。由于它们善于社交，训练可以成为增进感情的活动。一致性是关键，避免惩罚，因为这会破坏信任。东方猫对挑战智力的益智玩具反应良好。它们也可以被训练使用抓柱而不是家具。对于猫砂盆训练，提供一个干净的猫砂盆并放在安静的区域。这些猫学得很快，但它们的固执可能需要耐心。立即奖励期望的行为以强化学习。

diet.en: Feed your Oriental cat a high-quality, protein-rich diet appropriate for their life stage (kitten, adult, senior). Orientals are active and have a fast metabolism, so they may require more calories than less active breeds. However, monitor their weight to prevent obesity. A combination of wet and dry food is ideal, as wet food provides hydration and dry food helps with dental health. Provide fresh water daily and consider a water fountain to encourage drinking. Feed 2-3 meals per day rather than free-feeding to regulate intake. Avoid foods with fillers like corn or soy. Treats should be given sparingly. Consult your vet for specific dietary recommendations, especially if your cat has any health issues. Some Orientals may have sensitive stomachs, so introduce new foods gradually. Omega-3 fatty acids from fish oil can support coat health and joint function.
diet.zh: 为东方猫提供适合其生命阶段（幼猫、成猫、老年猫）的高质量、高蛋白饮食。东方猫活跃且新陈代谢快，因此可能比不活跃的品种需要更多卡路里。但需监测体重以防止肥胖。湿粮和干粮的组合是理想的，因为湿粮提供水分，干粮有助于牙齿健康。每天提供新鲜水，并考虑使用饮水机以鼓励饮水。每天喂2-3餐，而不是自由采食，以调节摄入量。避免含有玉米或大豆等填充物的食物。零食应适量给予。咨询兽医获取具体饮食建议，特别是当猫有健康问题时。有些东方猫可能肠胃敏感，因此新食物应逐步引入。来自鱼油的Omega-3脂肪酸可以支持毛发健康和关节功能。

livingTips.en: Orientals thrive in homes where they receive plenty of attention. They are not suited for owners who are away all day, as they can become lonely and destructive. They adapt well to apartments if provided with vertical spaces like cat trees and shelves, as they love to climb. A secure balcony or window perch can offer entertainment. They are generally good with children who respect their boundaries, and they often get along with other cats and cat-friendly dogs, especially if raised together. However, their dominant personality may clash with other assertive pets. Orientals are curious and may open cabinets or doors, so childproof locks can prevent mischief. Provide a variety of toys and rotate them to prevent boredom. They enjoy interactive play and will appreciate a companion cat. Ensure windows are screened and toxic plants are removed. Overall, an Oriental cat needs an engaging, safe environment with loving companionship.
livingTips.zh: 东方猫在能获得大量关注的家庭中茁壮成长。它们不适合整天外出的主人，因为会感到孤独并产生破坏行为。如果提供垂直空间如猫爬架和架子，它们能很好地适应公寓，因为它们喜欢攀爬。一个安全的阳台或窗台栖架可以提供娱乐。它们通常与尊重它们界限的孩子相处良好，并且经常与其他猫和友善的狗相处，尤其是从小一起养大的。然而，它们的主导个性可能与其他强势宠物冲突。东方猫好奇，可能会打开柜子或门，所以儿童安全锁可以防止恶作剧。提供多种玩具并轮换以防止无聊。它们喜欢互动游戏，并会欣赏有伴侣猫。确保窗户有纱窗，并移除有毒植物。总的来说，东方猫需要一个充满互动、安全的环境和充满爱的陪伴。
